docket_entries.description: STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY KJESBU, KJERSTI

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF KJERSTI KJESBU IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT MARVIN GOCHEZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH ; CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF KJESBU, KJERSTI

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-21-2024 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY FILING OF PROOF OF SERVICE TO DEC-12-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF KJERSTI KJESBU IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MARVIN GOCHEZ IS NOT PRESENT. THE PROOF OF SERVICE DATED 10/20/24 IS ORDERED TO BE FILED. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO CONTACT DEFENDANT BY TELEPHONE TO INFORM HIM OF THE NEW HEARING DATE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JAMES CHANG; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

ORDER OF DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)
